StrangeMarble.name: ITEM_STRANGEMARBLE_NAME
StrangeMarble.desc_resolved: Your basic attack inflicts Mana Leech 1.

VibratingSkull.name: ITEM_VIBRATINGSKULL_NAME
VibratingSkull.desc_resolved: Your basic attack inflicts Magic Weakness 1.

BoneMarrow.name: ITEM_BONEMARROW_NAME
BoneMarrow.desc_resolved: Heal to full at the end of each battle.

SelfDestructButton.name: ITEM_SELFDESTRUCTBUTTON_NAME
SelfDestructButton.desc_resolved: Use: Vaporize yourself and deal 50 damage to adjacent units.

EmptySyringe.name: ITEM_EMPTYSYRINGE_NAME
EmptySyringe.desc_resolved: When you inflict Bleed or Poison, inflict +1 Bleed or Poison.

LiquidNitrogen.name: ITEM_LIQUIDNITROGEN_NAME
LiquidNitrogen.desc_resolved: Your Ice Element damage is increased by 2.

Ember.name: ITEM_EMBER_NAME
Ember.desc_resolved: Your Fire Element damage is increased by 1 and inflicts +1 Burn.

Conductor.name: ITEM_CONDUCTOR_NAME
Conductor.desc_resolved: Your Electric Element damage is increased by 1 and has +10% chance to Stun.

FeedBag.name: ITEM_FEEDBAG_NAME
FeedBag.desc_resolved: Familiars you spawn gain +2 max HP.

Nightshade.name: ITEM_NIGHTSHADE_NAME
Nightshade.desc_resolved:
When you inflict Poison, inflict +2 Poison.
Start with Poison 2.

Pawn.name: ITEM_PAWN_NAME
Pawn.desc_resolved: Use: Move 1 tile toward the closest enemy.

Knight.name: ITEM_KNIGHT_NAME
Knight.desc_resolved: Use: Jump in an L shape.

Rook.name: ITEM_ROOK_NAME
Rook.desc_resolved: Use: Move any number of tiles in a straight line.

Queen.name: ITEM_QUEEN_NAME
Queen.desc_resolved: Use: Move any number of tiles in a straight or diagonal line.

FishHook.name: ITEM_FISHHOOK_NAME
FishHook.desc_resolved: If you would knockback a unit, instead deal extra damage to it equal to the knockback.

D6.name: ITEM_D6_NAME
D6.desc_resolved: You can reroll your options when you level up.

MetalSquare.name: ITEM_METALPLATE_NAME
MetalSquare.desc_resolved: Gain +1 Brace when you kill an enemy.

BlinkingEyeball.name: ITEM_BLINKINGEYEBALL_NAME
BlinkingEyeball.desc_resolved: Your line of sight restrictions are ignored.

GoldenTooth.name: ITEM_GOLDENTOOTH_NAME
GoldenTooth.desc_resolved: Becomes {aux} coins when you return home.

WaterBottle_Full.name: ITEM_WATERBOTTLEFULL_NAME
WaterBottle_Full.desc_resolved:
Use: Heal +5 HP and gain Heatwave immunity.
Refills when affected by Water Element effects.

WaterBottle_Half.name: ITEM_WATERBOTTLEHALF_NAME
WaterBottle_Half.desc_resolved:
Use: Heal +5 HP and gain Heatwave immunity.
Refills when affected by Water Element effects.

WaterBottle_Empty.name: ITEM_WATERBOTTLEEMPTY_NAME
WaterBottle_Empty.desc_resolved:
Use: Throw it at something.
Refills when affected by Water Element effects.

BloodyCoin.name: ITEM_BLOODYCOIN_NAME
BloodyCoin.desc_resolved:
Use: Flip a coin.
Heads: Refresh your basic attack.
Tails: Lose 50% of your HP.

GlowingCoin.name: ITEM_GLOWINGCOIN_NAME
GlowingCoin.desc_resolved:
Use: Flip a coin.
Heads: Double your mana.
Tails: Lose 50% of your mana.

ElectricCoin.name: ITEM_ELECTRICCOIN_NAME
ElectricCoin.desc_resolved:
Use: Flip a coin.
Heads: Refresh your movement action.
Tails: Gain Slow 2.

CounterfeitCoin.name: ITEM_COUNTERFEITCOIN_NAME
CounterfeitCoin.desc_resolved:
Use: Flip a coin.
Heads: Gain 5 coins.
Tails: Lose 5 coins.

Whistle.name: ITEM_WHISTLE_NAME
Whistle.desc_resolved:
Use: Summon a Fly, Maggot or Flea familiar.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

Metronome.name: ITEM_METRONOME_NAME
Metronome.desc_resolved:
Use: Cast a random upgraded spell.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

TinkerTools.name: ITEM_TINKERTOOLS_NAME
TinkerTools.desc_resolved: Repair 1 use to your items at the end of each battle.

RingOfFrost.name: ITEM_RINGOFFROST_NAME
RingOfFrost.desc_resolved:
Freezes tiles you walk over. +25% chance to inflict Freeze on units that contact or attack you.
Your Ice Element damage is increased by 1.

LuckyCoinPurse.name: ITEM_LUCKYCOINPURSE_NAME
LuckyCoinPurse.desc_resolved: Gain +2 [img:lck] each time you gain a coin.

RageJuice.name: ITEM_RAGEJUICE_NAME
RageJuice.desc_resolved:
Use: Gain +4 [img:str], +4 [img:spd], Brace 2 and Madness for the rest of the battle.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

PrayerCard.name: ITEM_PRAYERCARD_NAME
PrayerCard.desc_resolved: 33% chance to gain +1 [img:divineshield] each time you take damage.

BagOfSeeds.name: ITEM_BAGOFSEEDS_NAME
BagOfSeeds.desc_resolved: Use: Spawn grass, flowers, or brambles on an adjacent tile.

Libra.name: ITEM_LIBRA_NAME
Libra.desc_resolved: Balances all stats. This applies after all stat modifiers.

BallOfBandages.name: ITEM_BALLOFBANDAGES_NAME
BallOfBandages.desc_resolved:
Cleanse one stack of a random debuff at the end of each turn.
+1 Health Regen.

Natural20.name: ITEM_NATURAL20_NAME
Natural20.desc_resolved:
Your weapons have +50% Crit Chance.
Your basic attack has +10% Crit Chance.

Technology.name: ITEM_TECHNOLOGY_NAME
Technology.desc_resolved:
Use: Shoot a laser beam.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]
Refreshes when affected by Electricity.

RedDrink.name: ITEM_REDDRINK_NAME
RedDrink.desc_resolved:
Use: Heal 5 HP.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

GreenDrink.name: ITEM_GREENDRINK_NAME
GreenDrink.desc_resolved:
Use: Gain 5 mana.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

PurpleDrink.name: ITEM_PURPLEDRINK_NAME
PurpleDrink.desc_resolved:
Use: Heal 2 HP, gain 2 mana and +1 [img:shield].
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

LilBattery.name: ITEM_LILBATTERY_NAME
LilBattery.desc_resolved:
Use: Refresh all items and spells with a once per battle restriction.
Can be used on allies.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle. Can't be refreshed.)[/s]

CarvingKnife.name: ITEM_CARVINGKNIFE_NAME
CarvingKnife.desc_resolved: Use: Take 2 damage and spawn a Meat pickup.

RazorBlade.name: ITEM_RAZORBLADE_NAME
RazorBlade.desc_resolved: Use: Take 5 damage and gain +2 [img:str] and +2 [img:dex].

Teleport.name: ITEM_TELEPORT_NAME
Teleport.desc_resolved:
Use: Teleport to any open tile.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

SmallEye.name: ITEM_SMALLEYE_NAME
SmallEye.desc_resolved:
+15% Dodge Chance.
Your basic attack has a +10% chance to inflict Fear.

Stickman.name: ITEM_STICKMAN_NAME
Stickman.desc_resolved: Gain All Stats Up when you deal damage to a party member.

CursedStickman.name: ITEM_CURSEDSTICKMAN_NAME
CursedStickman.desc_resolved:
Gain All Stats Up when you deal damage to a party member.
10% chance to gain Madness at the start of your turn.

GlowingSeed.name: ITEM_GLOWINGSEED_NAME
GlowingSeed.desc_resolved: Your basic attack spawns tall grass.

WeirdEgg.name: ITEM_WEIRDEGG_NAME
WeirdEgg.desc_resolved: 10% chance to spawn a controllable Fetus familiar at the end of each turn. It joins your party.

MundaneStone.name: ITEM_MUNDANESTONE_NAME
MundaneStone.desc_resolved: Your basic attack's damage is increased by your lowest stat minus 2.

EmptySack.name: ITEM_EMPTYSACK_NAME
EmptySack.desc_resolved:
Spawn 3 pickups at the start of each battle.
Find an extra common item at the end of each battle.

AAABattery.name: ITEM_AAABATTERY_NAME
AAABattery.desc_resolved: Every time you cast 3 spells, gain +3 Charge.

ToolBox.name: ITEM_TOOLBOX_NAME
ToolBox.desc_resolved:
Your items lose Brittle and Fragile.
Your weapons have a 25% chance to repair 1 use when used.

RubberCement.name: ITEM_RUBBERCEMENT_NAME
RubberCement.desc_resolved: Your projectiles bounce to another enemy within 2 tiles.

CoinPurse.name: ITEM_COINPURSE_NAME
CoinPurse.desc_resolved:
When you collect a coin pickup, gain +1 coin.
Find an extra coin at the end of each battle.

Fork.name: ITEM_FORK_NAME
Fork.desc_resolved: Heal 5 HP when you kill a unit or destroy a corpse.

CatONineTails.name: ITEM_CATONINETAILS_NAME
CatONineTails.desc_resolved: Use: Take 1 damage and cleanse one random debuff.

Glue.name: ITEM_GLUE_NAME
Glue.desc_resolved: Use: Gain +20% Dodge Chance, -1 [img:int] and Confusion 2.

MyShadow.name: ITEM_MYSHADOW_NAME
MyShadow.desc_resolved:
Use: Move 3 tiles, leaving a shadow copy behind that mimics your basic attack.
The shadow fades at the end of the turn.

EggSack.name: ITEM_EGGSACK_NAME
EggSack.desc_resolved: Use: Spawns Spiderlings in an area.

GorgonsEye.name: ITEM_GORGONSEYE_NAME
GorgonsEye.desc_resolved: Use: Petrify all nearby units in your line of sight.

ButterBean.name: ITEM_BUTTERBEAN_NAME
ButterBean.desc_resolved: Use: Fart at an adjacent unit, knocking it back 1 tile.

MomsRing.name: ITEM_MOMSRING_NAME
MomsRing.desc_resolved: +1 Damage. Find a pill at the end of each battle.

SkillStone.name: ITEM_SKILLSTONE_NAME
SkillStone.desc_resolved: Spells that match your class cost -1 mana.

Multiplier.name: ITEM_MULTIPLIER_NAME
Multiplier.desc_resolved: You can use your weapon an extra time each turn.

SacredHeart.name: ITEM_SACREDHEART_NAME
SacredHeart.desc_resolved: +1 Damage. Emit 2 Sparkles when you use your basic attack.

FetusInAJar.name: ITEM_FETUSINAJAR_NAME
FetusInAJar.desc_resolved:
At the the start of each battle, equip a temporary Bomb if your weapon slot is open.
At the end of each turn, if you didn't use your basic attack, equip another Bomb.

DreamCatcher.name: ITEM_DREAMCATCHER_NAME
DreamCatcher.desc_resolved: Whenever you fall asleep, gain All Stats Up, restore all your mana, and heal a random injury.

EnchantingPoop.name: ITEM_ENCHANTINGPOOP_NAME
EnchantingPoop.desc_resolved: Spawn a poop at the start of each battle.

LunchBox.name: ITEM_LUNCHBOX_NAME
LunchBox.desc_resolved:
Use: Heal 5 HP.
Whenever you collect a food pickup, instead of its normal effects, add +1 use to this item.

SatanicBible.name: ITEM_SATANICBIBLE_NAME
SatanicBible.desc_resolved: Heal 3 HP and gain +3 Charge each time you damage a party member.

TinyPebble.name: ITEM_TINYPEBBLE_NAME
TinyPebble.desc_resolved:
+10% Dodge Chance.
Gain +2% Dodge Chance when you dodge an attack.

ScrapBag.name: ITEM_SCRAPBAG_NAME
ScrapBag.desc_resolved: Craft a temporary weapon at the start of the battle if you don't have a weapon.

Cookbook.name: ITEM_COOKBOOK_NAME
Cookbook.desc_resolved: When you kill a unit or destroy a corpse, it becomes meat.

TarotDeck.name: ITEM_TAROTDECK_NAME
TarotDeck.desc_resolved: Use: Conjure a random, single-use spell as a bonus ability.

TinyCage.name: ITEM_TINYCAGE_NAME
TinyCage.desc_resolved: Spawn a random animal familiar at the start of each battle.

SpellBook.name: ITEM_SPELLBOOK_NAME
SpellBook.desc_resolved: Use: Gain 10 mana and conjure a random Mage spell as a bonus ability.

BagOfBags.name: ITEM_BAGOFBAGS_NAME
BagOfBags.desc_resolved: Use: Throw a trash bag on an adjacent tile.

Steroids.name: ITEM_STEROIDS_NAME
Steroids.desc_resolved: Use: Gain +1 [img:str], permanently. For the rest of the adventure, you have a +2% chance to gain Madness at the start of each turn.

TankJuice.name: ITEM_TANKJUICE_NAME
TankJuice.desc_resolved: Use: Gain -1 [img:spd], then, for the rest of the turn, all damage you deal has Knockback 2 and Chain Knockback.

HuntersFlute.name: ITEM_HUNTERSFLUTE_NAME
HuntersFlute.desc_resolved:
Spawn 2-3 random familiars on adjacent tiles.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

FriendshipBracelet.name: ITEM_FRIENDSHIPBRACELET_NAME
FriendshipBracelet.desc_resolved: Use: Permanently charm a non-boss enemy. It joins your party.

CambionConception.name: ITEM_CAMBIONCONCEPTION_NAME
CambionConception.desc_resolved: Use: Summon a half-sized copy of yourself that has 66% of your stats and is AI controlled.

EmptyHand.name: ITEM_EMPTYHAND_NAME
EmptyHand.desc_resolved:
Use: Gain +3 [img:shield] for each empty armor slot you have.
When this breaks, gain +1 [img:con] permanently.

Fireworks.name: ITEM_FIREWORKS_NAME
Fireworks.desc_resolved:
Use: Emit 5 Sparkles.
If you end your turn with 0 mana, this gains +1 use.

SackOfMeat.name: ITEM_SACKOFMEAT_NAME
SackOfMeat.desc_resolved:
Use: Heal 4 HP.
This gains +1 use each time you destroy a corpse.

DruidsWhistle.name: ITEM_DRUIDSWHISTLE_NAME
DruidsWhistle.desc_resolved:
Use: Spawn a random animal familiar on an adjacent tile.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

BallOfYarn.name: ITEM_BALLOFYARN_NAME
BallOfYarn.desc_resolved: Spawn a Charmed Kitten with All Stats Up 2 at the start of each battle.

BirdHead.name: ITEM_BIRDHEAD_NAME
BirdHead.desc_resolved: Your basic attack inflicts Soul Link.

Bishop.name: ITEM_BISHOP_NAME
Bishop.desc_resolved: Use: Move any number of tiles in a diagonal line.

GoldenEgg.name: ITEM_GOLDENEGG_NAME
GoldenEgg.desc_resolved: Find 3-5 extra coins at the end of each battle.

BirdFeed.name: ITEM_BIRDFEED_NAME
BirdFeed.desc_resolved: +50% chance for an extra bird to spawn at the start of each battle.

AngelWing.name: ITEM_ANGELWING_NAME
AngelWing.desc_resolved: If an attack would down you, instead lower your HP to 1. While at 1 HP, this has no effect.

SoulJar.name: ITEM_SOULJAR_NAME
SoulJar.desc_resolved: When your body is destroyed, this item is recovered and permanently gains the ability to summon a ghost copy of you.

SoulJar_Full.name: ITEM_SOULJAR_FULL_NAME
SoulJar_Full.desc_resolved:
Use: Summon a ghost copy of {aux_cat_name}.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

PetrifiedPinky.name: ITEM_PETRIFIEDPINKY_NAME
PetrifiedPinky.desc_resolved: If an attack would down you, instead this breaks and you regain 50% of your max HP.

CatRib.name: ITEM_CATRIB_NAME
CatRib.desc_resolved: When your body is destroyed, you are reborn as a kitten!

EstusFlask_Full.name: ITEM_ESTUSFLASK_NAME
EstusFlask_Full.desc_resolved: Use: Heal 5 HP. This refills at the end of each battle.

EstusFlask_Half.name: ITEM_ESTUSFLASK_NAME
EstusFlask_Half.desc_resolved: Use: Heal 5 HP. This refills at the end of each battle.

EstusFlask_Empty.name: ITEM_ESTUSFLASK_NAME
EstusFlask_Empty.desc_resolved: Use: Heal 5 HP. This refills at the end of each battle.

LuckyCoin.name: ITEM_LUCKYCOIN_NAME
LuckyCoin.desc_resolved: Coins that spawn at the start of each battle are doubled.

HeavyRock.name: ITEM_HEAVYROCK_NAME
HeavyRock.desc_resolved: Rocks you knock back deal +5 damage and have Chain Knockback.

Ipecac.name: ITEM_IPECAC_NAME
Ipecac.desc_resolved: Your basic attack is Explosive Shot.

MeatCube.name: ITEM_MEATCUBE_NAME
MeatCube.desc_resolved: Start with a Flesh Lad familiar.

SoyMilk.name: ITEM_SOYMILK_NAME
SoyMilk.desc_resolved:
Your basic attack cannot deal more than 1 damage.
You can attack 2 extra times each turn.

SpoonBender.name: ITEM_SPOONBENDER_NAME
SpoonBender.desc_resolved: Your basic attack can't miss and emits a Sparkle when used.

Cancer.name: ITEM_CANCER_NAME
Cancer.desc_resolved: At the end of each battle, gain -1 to three random stats, then gain a mutation.

BloodyRazor.name: ITEM_BLOODYRAZOR_NAME
BloodyRazor.desc_resolved: Use: Deal 5 damage to yourself to gain +3 Damage and +1 Magic Damage.

ImmaculateHeart.name: ITEM_IMMACULATEHEART_NAME
ImmaculateHeart.desc_resolved: +2 Damage, +1 Magic Damage. Emit 3 Sparkles when you use your basic attack.

DybbuksRib.name: ITEM_DYBBUKSRIB_NAME
DybbuksRib.desc_resolved: Charm a random enemy at the start of each battle.

SnakeEyes.name: ITEM_SNAKEEYES_NAME
SnakeEyes.desc_resolved: While you are at exactly 2 HP, you have +222 [img:lck]

GreenWhistle.name: ITEM_GREENWHISTLE_NAME
GreenWhistle.desc_resolved:
Use: Summon a really big Leg.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

PentagramSigil.name: ITEM_PENTAGRAMSIGIL_NAME
PentagramSigil.desc_resolved: Use: Take 5 damage and refresh your basic attack and movement actions.

LuciferSigil.name: ITEM_LUCIFERSIGIL_NAME
LuciferSigil.desc_resolved: Summon a Charmed Brute at the start of each battle.

HexagramSigil.name: ITEM_HEXAGRAMSIGIL_NAME
HexagramSigil.desc_resolved:
+3 Magic Damage.
You are immune to buffs and debuffs.
When you die, you don't leave a corpse.

CharonsObal.name: ITEM_CHARONSOBAL_NAME
CharonsObal.desc_resolved: +6 corpse health. Spawn a Charmed Reaper when you are downed.

Glitch.name: ITEM_GLITCH_NAME
Glitch.desc_resolved: Use: Scramble the last spell you used. Permanently.

TV.name: ITEM_TV_NAME
TV.desc_resolved: Your bonus ability is Waste Time.

Triachnid.name: ITEM_TRIACHNID_NAME
Triachnid.desc_resolved: Spawn Triachnid at the start of each battle.

GallonOfWater.name: ITEM_GALLONOFWATER_NAME
GallonOfWater.desc_resolved:
Use: Heal +5 HP and gain Heatwave immunity.
Refills when affected by Water Element effects.

ScorchedEarth.name: ITEM_SCORCHEDEARTH_NAME
ScorchedEarth.desc_resolved: Your Earth and Fire Element spells cost -1 mana.

StevenMarrow.name: ITEM_STEVENMARROW_NAME
StevenMarrow.desc_resolved: Any [img:shield] you gain is increased by 4.

StevenTrinket1.name: ITEM_STEVENTRINKET1_NAME
StevenTrinket1.desc_resolved:
Your basic attack inflicts Slow and has a +10% chance to Freeze.
You can damage frozen units.

NinnyStick.name: ITEM_NINNYSTICK_NAME
NinnyStick.desc_resolved:
Reroll your other equipped items at the end of each battle.
You can reroll your options when you level up.

SkillSplit.name: ITEM_SKILLSPLIT_NAME
SkillSplit.desc_resolved: Gain a temporary copy of your first passive ability at the start of each battle.

FurnitureBox.name: ITEM_FURNITUREBOX_NAME
FurnitureBox.desc_resolved:
Breaks when [img:shield] is depleted.
Becomes a random piece of furniture when you return home.

FurnitureBox_Rare.name: ITEM_FURNITUREBOX_RARE_NAME
FurnitureBox_Rare.desc_resolved:
Breaks when [img:shield] is depleted.
Becomes a random piece of rare furniture when you return home.

Ankh.name: ITEM_ANKH_NAME
Ankh.desc_resolved: While you're downed, you have a 50% chance to revive with 33% HP at the end of each round.

TheBoxCardboard.name: ITEM_THEBOXCARDBOARD_NAME
TheBoxCardboard.desc_resolved: Find an extra chapter item at the end of each battle.

TheBoxChest.name: ITEM_THEBOXCHEST_NAME
TheBoxChest.desc_resolved:
Use: Spawn A lost Spirit. This gains +1 use whenever an allied cat dies.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

TheBox.name: ITEM_THEBOX_NAME
TheBox.desc_resolved:
Use: Revive all bodies, fully heal all units, and clear all status effects.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

TheBlackBox.name: ITEM_THEBLACKBOX_NAME
TheBlackBox.desc_resolved: Use: Find and equip a random item into one of your empty item slots.

SkullOfGlorg.name: ITEM_SKULLOFGLORG_NAME
SkullOfGlorg.desc_resolved: Your spells cost -1 mana for each parasite you have equipped.

Checkers.name: Checkers
Checkers.desc: Use: Move 1 tile diagonally. If a unit is in the way, leap 2 tiles over it instead, dealing 4 damage to it and refresh this. You cannot use this to move to a tile you've previously occupied this turn.
